chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5907 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 10-04-2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui, advocate for Respondents 1 and 2 Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General. This petition is pending since 2023 without any progress. Petitioner is unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
